objective: Indoor Cat Authority — Maximum Crawl Budget Concentration

tierA.label: Core Focus — index, follow, in sitemap

tierB1.label: Supporting Cat — index, follow, NOT in sitemap

tierC.label: Suppressed — noindex, follow, excluded from everything
tierC.note: All non-cat products + cheap generic items. Remain purchasable but invisible to search.

homepageChanges: H1: 'Premium Cat Trees, Condos & Indoor Cat Living'
3 pillar blocks: Cat Trees | Litter Boxes | Indoor Cat Furniture
Non-cat category images removed from loaders
Hero alt text updated to cat-focused
navigationChanges: Primary nav: Cat Trees | Litter Boxes | Cat Furniture | Guides | Bestsellers
Top Rated dropdown: Cat Trees + Litter Boxes + Bestsellers only
All non-cat categories removed from primary navigation

noindexEnforcement.productDetail: Tier C products now get <meta name='robots' content='noindex, follow'> automatically
noindexEnforcement.blogPosts: 223 non-cat posts marked is_noindexed=true in database
noindexEnforcement.collections: Non-cat collections filtered from sitemap generation
noindexEnforcement.rule: Any product where category NOT ILIKE '%cat%' → Tier C → noindex

children: sitemap-blog.xml (~30 cat blog posts, hard cap)
